## 📝 Changes
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## 🎯 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement

## ✅ Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tested on Chrome (latest)
- [ ] Tested on Safari (if UI changes)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (375px width)
- [ ] No console errors in browser dev tools
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] All new features have error handling
- [ ] Database migrations tested locally (if applicable)
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`npm test` if applicable)

## 🔒 Security Checklist
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in client-side code
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in code (use env vars)
- [ ] Input validation implemented for user inputs
- [ ] RLS policies updated (if database changes)

## 📸 Screenshots
<!-- Add screenshots if UI changes -->
<!-- Before/After comparisons are helpful -->

<!-- Link to related issues: Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->
